title: Microsoft raises Xbox console prices worldwide up to $150
summary: The company discontinues the 2 TB model and applies significant increases in all markets.

title: Apple increases Mac and iPad prices due to rising RAM costs
summary: The rise in component costs forces the company to raise prices of its products, while users look for discounts.

title: Microsoft extends free Windows 10 security updates to 2027
summary: Users can continue receiving free security patches for one more year than originally planned.

title: IBM introduces new 0.7 nanometer Nanostack transistor technology
summary: The new process promises up to 50% more performance and 70% better energy efficiency compared to its 2 nm node.

title: AMD relaunches Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition, snapped up by scalpers
summary: The popular AM4 processor returns as a limited edition, selling for over $600 on the resale market.

title: United States requires OpenAI to restrict deployment of GPT-5.6 for security
summary: The US administration requests case-by-case approval before the new model's launch.

title: Rockstar reveals official GTA VI price and confirms November release
summary: The game will have a basic version for 80 euros and a complete edition for 100 euros, with the disc version planned for December.

title: Valve changes Steam Machine performance promise from '4K 60 FPS' to 'up to 4K'
summary: A French retailer mocks the original high price with a similar PC at a much lower cost.

title: Google Finance launches standalone Android app with real-time data and AI
summary: The new app lets users monitor financial markets with integrated artificial intelligence tools.

title: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of using Claude without permission as Claude gains paid users
summary: The AI company advances against ChatGPT in the consumer market while denouncing unauthorized uses of its model.

title: Apple to skip M6 Pro and M6 Max chips to prioritize AI-focused M7 in 2027
summary: Reports indicate the company may release a basic M6 this year and prepare the M7 for 2027.

title: Samsung introduces Galaxy A27 5G with six years of updates
summary: The new mid-range model aims to become one of the best-selling phones with a competitive price.

title: YouTube updates Shorts with double-speed playback and removes dislike button
summary: The platform introduces user-requested changes to improve the short video experience.

title: Notion shuts down its email service Notion Mail to focus on AI agents
summary: The email product lasted only a year before the company redirected its efforts towards artificial intelligence.

title: Half-Life 2 can now be played in the web browser thanks to an unofficial WebGL 2 port
summary: A developer manages to run the classic Valve game directly in the browser without additional hardware.

title: Epic Games' Tim Sweeney criticizes Steam's AI tags and warns about 'AI Slop'
summary: The CEO believes AI tools can generate low-quality content and that Valve is acting irresponsibly.

title: Herculaneum scroll fully deciphered for the first time using AI
summary: Researchers manage to read a carbonized scroll from 79 AD thanks to advanced AI techniques.

title: Trump administration bans Polestar from selling electric cars in the US
summary: The electric vehicle brand faces a commercial blockade in the US market due to political decisions.

title: Polymarket suffers theft of user funds by hackers
summary: The decentralized betting platform reports an attack that compromised cryptocurrency stored in wallets.

title: Riot Games removes always-on requirement for its Vanguard anti-cheat
summary: The system can now run on demand instead of running all the time on the system.
